headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 1 We Avoid

headline: AT&T (T) Takes On Identity Fraud While Testing Real Time 5G Mobility
summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) is working with T-Mobile, Verizon, and Aduna on a network-level tool to counter AI-driven digital identity fraud across U.S. mobile networks. The carrier is also taking part in industry-first field trials of Ericsson's Low-Latency Mobility technology on its 5G network to support real-time applications. These developments come as AT&T's share price stands at $21.81, with mixed recent returns across different time frames. For investors watching AT&T (NYSE:T), the new security...

headline: Kalshi, Oura Ring, and AT&T Score the Most Engaging Ads of the FIFA World Cup 2026™, ranked by TV outcomes data on edo.com/worldcup
summary: NEW YORK, July 20, 2026--EDO, the TV outcomes company, today released its performance ranking of the entire FIFA World Cup 2026™ — from the tournament's opening match to the final. EDO’s World Cup TV outcomes ranker showcases brands like Kalshi, Oura Ring, and AT&T in the lead with the most engaging spots of the tournament.
